response_text:
ENTITY Passenger
PK passenger_id
ATTR passenger_id : varchar : PK
ATTR first_name : varchar
ATTR last_name : varchar
ATTR seat_number : varchar

ENTITY CrewMember
PK crew_id
ATTR crew_id : varchar : PK
ATTR first_name : varchar
ATTR last_name : varchar
ATTR role : varchar

ENTITY Flight
PK flight_number
ATTR flight_number : varchar : PK
ATTR flight_date : date
ATTR departure_time : time
ATTR arrival_time : time
ATTR status : varchar

ENTITY Airport
PK airport_code
ATTR airport_code : varchar : PK
ATTR airport_name : varchar
ATTR city_code : varchar

ENTITY City
PK city_code
ATTR city_code : varchar : PK
ATTR city_name : varchar

ENTITY Airline
PK airline_code
ATTR airline_code : varchar : PK
ATTR airline_name : varchar

ENTITY Airplane
PK registration_number
ATTR registration_number : varchar : PK
ATTR model : varchar

ENTITY FlightStatus
PK status_id
ATTR status_id : varchar : PK
ATTR status_name : varchar

ENTITY FlightCrewAssignment
PK flight_number, crew_id
ATTR flight_number : varchar : PK : FK
ATTR crew_id : varchar : PK : FK
ATTR role : varchar

ENTITY FlightStatusHistory
PK flight_number, status_date_time
ATTR flight_number : varchar : PK : FK
ATTR status_date_time : timestamp : PK
ATTR status_id : varchar : FK

ENTITY BaggageBeltAssignment
PK flight_number
ATTR flight_number : varchar : PK : FK
ATTR belt_number : varchar

REL Passenger -> Flight : 1..N -> 1 : FK=flight_number
REL CrewMember -> FlightCrewAssignment : 1..N -> 0..N : FK=crew_id
REL Flight -> Airport : 1 -> 1 : FK=departure_airport_code
REL Flight -> Airport : 1 -> 1 : FK=arrival_airport_code
REL Flight -> Airline : 1 -> 1 : FK=airline_code
REL Flight -> Airplane : 1 -> 1 : FK=registration_number
REL Airport -> City : 1 -> 1 : FK=city_code
REL FlightCrewAssignment -> CrewMember : 1 -> 1 : FK=crew_id
REL FlightCrewAssignment -> Flight : 1 -> 1 : FK=flight_number
REL FlightStatusHistory -> Flight : 1 -> 1 : FK=flight_number
REL FlightStatusHistory -> FlightStatus : 1 -> 1 : FK=status_id
REL BaggageBeltAssignment -> Flight : 1 -> 1 : FK=flight_number
